error.password_too_long: The Secure Controls mobile app only accepts passwords up to 12 characters.
error.invalid_mac: Enter a valid MAC address (12 hex characters, with or without colons).
error.invalid_device_type: Only E7+ is currently supported for local BLE setup.
error.commissioning_not_started: Tick the commissioning checkbox after putting the controller into pairing mode.
error.commissioning_failed: Could not complete local BLE commissioning. Confirm the controller is in commissioning mode and retry.
error.commissioning_invalid_result: Commissioning completed but did not return a usable BLE key.

abort.reconfigure_failed: SecureMTR could not load pending reconfigure data.

user.title: Connection method
user.description: Choose how Home Assistant should connect to your SecureMTR controller.

cloud.title: Secure Controls account
cloud.description: Enter the username (email address) and password that you use with the Secure Controls mobile app.

local_ble.title: Local BLE onboarding
local_ble.description: Enter your controller details exactly as shown on the device label.

local_ble_commissioning.title: Start controller commissioning
local_ble_commissioning.description: Put the E7+ controller into commissioning mode now, then tick the checkbox to start BLE commissioning for serial {serial_number} ({mac_address}).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure connection
reconfigure.description: Choose how this SecureMTR entry should connect.

reconfigure_cloud.title: Update Secure Controls account
reconfigure_cloud.description: Enter the cloud account credentials for this existing entry.

reconfigure_local_ble.title: Update local BLE details
reconfigure_local_ble.description: Enter the E7+ serial number and MAC address for this entry.

reconfigure_local_ble_commissioning.title: Recommission local BLE
reconfigure_local_ble_commissioning.description: Put the E7+ controller into commissioning mode now, then tick the checkbox to recommission serial {serial_number} ({mac_address}).

init.title: SecureMTR statistics options
init.description: Configure the runtime statistics defaults used for SecureMTR.

data_description.primary_anchor: Base time used to align the primary zone statistics window.
data_description.boost_anchor: Base time used to align the boost zone statistics window.
data_description.element_power_kw: Power rating used when deriving energy consumption from runtime.
data_description.prefer_device_energy: Use SecureMTR provided energy totals instead of derived values when available.

reset_energy_accumulator.name: Reset energy accumulator
reset_energy_accumulator.description: Reset the cumulative energy statistics for a SecureMTR config entry zone.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Config entry ID of the SecureMTR controller to reset.

zone.name: Zone
zone.description: SecureMTR zone to reset. Defaults to the primary zone.
